name: Clear-Act: 36h stockout + 21-day primary delay + 25% price spike + PLATINUM in 18h
rubric_notes: Three reinforcing factors: (a) PLATINUM customer at risk in 18h <24h, (b) primary delay (21d = 504h) >> 36h stock cover, (c) 25% spot-price spike making waiting expensive. Notably StablePrice Co at +8% baseline is materially CHEAPER than current spot (+25%) — switching is both faster AND cheaper. The PLATINUM-in-<24h rule alone forces immediate_switch; the delay-vs-cover rule reinforces. Severity CRITICAL via PLATINUM-at-risk rule. Confidence HIGH — this is overdetermined and the Skeptic has no defensible counter-position.
